race.comment: CROCS (8) hasn't been sighted since a 1.4L defeat in an Open 2YO race in Saturday company 81 days ago. The wide draw this time is no issue with the pattern she adopted on debut. Back to Maiden company now and she can make a statement. QUEDJINUP (11) has shown good ability at the trials coming into this, winning her only trial this time in. Fiore's booking is a good push for her chances and with a touch of luck from the barrier, she'll be in this for a long way. GOD OF TEXAS (4) is another debutant, this time for the Steve Wolfe barn. He looks to get his chance from a good draw today and he can make an impression in what looks a suitable race on debut. WESTERN SPLENDOUR (1) resumes a gelding and his latest trial suggests he's an improved commodity this time in. Creates some interest. MAGNIFICENT MALCOM (2) will be fitter for the fresh effort and this looks to suit him better.
